title: Thouinia nervosa
taxonomy: Thouinia nervosa is classified within the family Sapindaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the soapberry or lychee family. Thouinia nervosa is also classified within the genus Thouinia, which comprises several species of flowering plants. The genus Thouinia is native to the Caribbean and Central America, and is characterized by its unique, palm-like leaves. Thouinia nervosa is a species of tree that is endemic to the island of Hispaniola.
uses: Thouinia nervosa has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its leaves are said to have various medicinal properties.
